Author: AutoFates
Name: AutoFates
Punchline: Automated FATE farming with puni.sh-style integrations.
Description:
Automates FATE farming: leveling, single zone, shared fates, atma, demiatma, luminous crystals, memories, and a fully customizable manual mode. Integrates with vnavmesh, Lifestream, BossMod Reborn, Wrath Combo, Rotation Solver Reborn, and AutoRetainer. Handles chocobo companion + leveling, food/potion upkeep, auto repair, bicolor gemstone shopping, and configurable stop triggers.

This is an automation plugin; use at your own risk.
